_README: Admins & elevated permissions — kept SEPARATE from the employee roster so this can be edited without touching HR data. Add one object per person, keyed by their work email. 'admin: true' grants full access. The app merges this into the roster at load. Edit this file and push it to add/remove an admin. (Once the API + Cosmos back-end is live, this same list moves into the database and becomes editable from the in-app Admin → Permissions screen.)
